features: Masterplast Oriental Rub is an effective herbal pain relief. The unique herbal blend has a soothing , warming sensation on muscles providing welcome relief from aches and pains
NON-GREASY: Apply gently to affected parts of the skin, keep away from eyes and do not apply to broken skin
SOOTHING: A warming massage rub for muscles that produces a soothing sensation. Ideal remedy for pulled muscles from running or a gym session
READY TO USE: Extra large pot, keep handy in sports and travel bags to sooth muscles as soon as discomfort starts
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use 32g Jar
description: Product Description Masterplast Oriental Rub is an effective herbal pain relief. The unique herbal blend has a soothing ,warming sensation on muscles providing welcome relief from aches and pains. Apply gently to affected parts of the skin, keep away from eyes and do not apply to broken skin. A warming massage rub for muscles that produces a soothing sensation. Ideal remedy for pulled muscles from running or a gym session. Tube 40g Ingredients Petrolatum, Menthol, Camphor, Methyl Salicylate, Paraffin, Eugenia Caryophyllus Leaf Oil, Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil, Cedrus Atlantica Bark Oil, Myristica Fragrans Kernel Oil, CI 26100, CI 61565, CI 47005 Directions Apply gently to affected parts of the skin, keep away from eyes and do not apply to broken skin Safety Warning Do not apply to broken skin See more
